name: Account Settings

slots.form: Name, email, bio inputs with inline edit

profile.description: Profile editing with avatar upload, name, email, bio

security.description: Security settings with password change and MFA controls

preferences.description: User preferences for theme, notifications, language

composition.SettingsContent: Panel(d-surface, flex-col, gap-8) > [AvatarUpload? + FormFields + SaveButton(d-interactive, variant: primary)]

description: Account management forms with presets for profile, security, preferences, and danger zone (account deletion).

layout_hints.spacing: Nav items have consistent padding. Active item stands out but doesn't shift layout.
layout_hints.active_state: Active nav/tab item should have a visible indicator: accent-colored left border (for vertical nav) or bottom border (for horizontal tabs), plus accent text color.
layout_hints.nav_position: For settings pages, vertical tab nav on the left. Content area scrolls independently.

visual_brief: Settings page with vertical navigation tabs on the left (Profile, Security, Notifications, Danger Zone) and form content on the right. Active tab highlighted with primary left-border. Each settings section is a d-surface card with grouped form fields, section heading, and Save button at bottom-right.
